ab: mnwah cu alang mita uba mu hesa.
ch: 昨天，我去部落拜訪爺爺。
en: Yesterday, I went to visit my grandpa in the tribe.

ab: bsya ci ini cami pkita la, lungun mu ci heya.
ch: 我們很久沒有見面了，我很想念他。
en: We haven’t seen each other for a long time and I miss him a lot.

ab: mita kinang uba mu ga, kni’an cu nya sikwa, pgubun cu nya ocya.
ch: 爺爺一看到我，就請我吃西瓜，請我喝茶。
en: As soon as grandpa saw me, he invited me to eat watermelon and drink tea.

ab: cbing ci sikwa mnuhi uba mu, ble calay ni’un.
ch: 爺爺種的西瓜很甜，真的很好吃。
en: The watermelon grown by grandpa is very sweet and really delicious.

ab: sli mu ocya uba mu, ble ci gubun uyi.
ch: 我喜歡爺爺的茶，也很好喝。
en: I also like grandpa’s tea, it’s tasted good too.

ab: tehok cka wagi lga, cami uya mu s’un myan phapuy ni’un kryaxan.
ch: 中午的時候，我和奶奶一起煮午餐。
en: At noon, I cooked lunch with my grandma.

ab: piyux ci nhapuy nya kryaxan uya mu, kyan ’cyux, welung, kabang ru musi.
ch: 奶奶煮了很豐盛的午餐，有魚、雞、南瓜、還有蝸牛。
en: Grandma cooked a big lunch, including fish, chicken, pumpkin, and snails.

ab: masu mani kryaxan lga, mosa cami hmbyat rami beh pmahan rami.
ch: 吃完午餐後，我們去菜園摘菜。
en: After lunch, we went to the vegetable garden to pick vegetables.

ab: uya mu ga bi’an cu nya piyux ci ngahi, cehuy ru inu, p’aras cu nya mosa sali.
ch: 奶奶給我很多地瓜、芋頭和蕗蕎，要我帶回家。
en: Grandma brought me a lot of sweet potatoes, taro and buckwheat, and asked me to take them home.

ab: sgayun mu naha, kyalun mu maha mwah caku mita naha loyi.
ch: 我跟他們道別，說下次再去看他們。
en: I said goodbye to them and said I’d see them next time.
